title: Regression test guards real startup schema-creation bug
evidence: BookApi.Tests/AppStartupTests.cs:16 spins a fresh on-disk DB and asserts POST /books returns 201; Program.cs:12-16 calls db.Database.EnsureCreated() at startup — the fix the test protects
suggestion: None — this is exemplary: the agent found the bug via a live run (masked by the test factory's EnsureCreated) and locked it with a failing-first test

title: ?author= filter is case-sensitive exact match
evidence: BookApi/Program.cs:47 query.Where(b => b.Author == author) — no normalization/contains
suggestion: Spec only requires a filter (satisfied); consider case-insensitive or partial match if desired. Not a defect.

title: No max-length / content validation beyond required Title+Author
evidence: BookApi/Program.cs:120-131 IsValid only checks blank Title/Author; Year and Isbn are unconstrained (e.g. negative/implausible year, arbitrary isbn)
suggestion: Spec only requires title+author required (satisfied); add field-shape validation only if stricter input hardening is wanted.
